hero.desc: Meet 1 Vajra — a 100% botanical formula of nine standardized herbal extracts, crafted to awaken immunity, stamina and vitality the way classical Ayurveda intended.

founder.title: A House Built on Trust.
founder.message: Dharmaraj Ayurveda was born from a single conviction — that the timeless wisdom of our Vedic sages deserves a modern home. Every bottle of 1 Vajra carries the discipline of classical Ayurveda, the rigor of modern science, and the love of a family-owned house from Surat. We do not just make supplements. We craft daily rituals that help you rise — and grow.

dosage_labels.caution_text: Pregnant or lactating women, children, or people with medical conditions must consult a healthcare professional before use. Keep out of reach of children.

how_steps.title: Standardized Extracts
how_steps.desc: We use HPLC-verified extracts (5% Withanolides, 95% Curcuminoids) instead of raw powders — guaranteeing precise potency in every capsule.

how_steps.title: Synergistic Blending
how_steps.desc: Trikatu (Ginger + Piper) is paired with Ashwagandha & Shatavari to multiply absorption (up to 2000% via piperine) and balance Vata-Pitta-Kapha.

how_steps.title: Daily Rasayana Ritual
how_steps.desc: Two capsules per day activate dormant Ojas. Over 30 days, immunity, stamina and clarity build quietly from within.

highlights.title: Ashwagandha Extract 30 grams
highlights.body: The classical adaptogen. Standardized to 5% Withanolides, it gently lowers cortisol and rebuilds stamina.

highlights.title: White Musli Extract 20 grams
highlights.body: Saponin-rich Chlorophytum revered as the 'divine ginseng' of India — for vitality and endurance.

highlights.title: Giloy Extract 15 grams
highlights.body: Tinospora's bitter wisdom — kindles immunity at the cellular level.

highlights.title: Amla Extract 10 grams
highlights.body: The ultimate rejuvenator. Vitamin-C rich tonic for cellular vitality and systemic detoxification.

highlights.title: Shatavari Extract 15 grams
highlights.body: The 'queen of herbs' — nourishment, hormonal balance, and feminine vitality.

highlights.title: Curcumin Extract 5 grams
highlights.body: 95% standardized Curcuminoids paired with Piperine for joint mobility and anti-oxidation.

highlights.title: Trikatu Extract 5 grams
highlights.body: Ginger, Black Pepper, Long Pepper — Ayurveda's classical fire for digestion and absorption.

faqs.q: Can I take 1 Vajra with other supplements?
faqs.a: Generally yes, but we recommend a 30-minute gap. Always consult your physician if on prescription medication.

Yes — vegetable HPMC capsule shell. 100% vegetarian and plant-based.

faqs.q: How long until I feel the benefits of 1 Vajra?
faqs.a: Most customers report noticeable energy and digestion improvements within 14–21 days. For deeper Rasayana effects, we recommend a continuous 60–90 day cycle.

faqs.q: Is 1 Vajra safe for daily long-term use?
faqs.a: Yes. 1 Vajra is a 100% botanical formulation with classically-used herbs. It is FSSAI-licensed as a health supplement and contains no stimulants or synthetics.
Absolutely. Shatavari and Amla make it particularly nourishing for women. Pregnant or lactating women should consult their healthcare provider first.
1 Vajra is gentle and well-tolerated. Those on prescription medication or with chronic conditions should consult a Vaidya or physician before use.

faqs.q: Where do you ship and how long does it take?
faqs.a: We ship across India. Metro cities receive orders in 2–4 working days; other locations in 4–7 working days. Free shipping above ₹999.

aboutPage.story_title: Selfless Service and Nature's Blessing: A Father's Journey
aboutPage.story_p1: Instead of resting after retirement, my father began an inspiring journey. For 15 years, he served the needy for free, combining Ayurvedic herbs and therapies. Witnessing thousands of patients heal gave him profound insight into the human body. Seeing their agony, he asked, "Why wait until we are ill to heal? Can we make the body strong enough to prevent disease?" This curiosity led him to ancient texts.
aboutPage.story_p1b: Combining years of clinical experience, he crafted unique Ayurvedic formulas using world-class herbal extracts. These formulas focus on five pillars: building ironclad stamina and immunity, regulating metabolic systems for heart and diabetes health, ensuring mental peace, and preventing severe diseases like cancer through cellular purification. With precise dosages and deep dedication, his work is now a beacon of hope, proving that true humanity lies in building a disease-free society.
aboutPage.story_p2: Each formulation begins with classical Vaidyas in Gujarat — physicians who have spent decades with the original Sanskrit texts. From there, every botanical is sent for HPLC standardization, third-party heavy-metal testing, and FSSAI-licensed manufacturing in a GMP-certified facility. No shortcuts. No filler. No noise.
aboutPage.story_p3: The result is 1 Vajra — and the apothecary we are quietly building behind it.
aboutPage.cta_title: A 30-day ritual, an old promise kept.
